headline: 25% Yield!? Why Robinhood Traders Are Piling Into This FANG Income ETF Like There’s No Tomorrow
summary: The pitch on the REX FANG & Innovation Equity Premium Income ETF (NASDAQ:FEPI) is pure Robinhood catnip. Mega-cap tech names you already love, monthly checks, and a distribution yield that has hovered in the 25% range since launch. FEPI sells covered calls on a FANG+ style basket and hands the option premium back as income, ... 25% Yield!? Why Robinhood Traders Are Piling Into This FANG Income ETF Like There’s No Tomorrow

headline: BTIG starts Robinhood at Buy, sees 20%-plus annual asset growth over next decade
summary: Investing.com -- In a note to clients on Friday, BTIG initiated coverage of Robinhood Markets with a Buy rating and a $125 price target, arguing the retail brokerage and wealth management platform is poised to compound assets at more than 20% annually over the next decade through demographic tailwinds, product expansion and international growth.

headline: HOOD Stock Declines Overnight: Robinhood Closes $2.2B Convertible Notes
summary: Robinhood said that the total offering comprised $2.0 billion from 0% convertible senior notes due 2029 and $200 million from the over-allotment option exercised by the initial purchasers.
